site.name: QR Photo Gallery
site.og_image_alt: A collage of candid photos captured by guests at a celebration
footer.tagline: The simplest way to collect every photo and video from your event — one QR code, original quality, one gallery.
cookie.label: Cookie consent
cookie.title: Analytics cookies
cookie.body: We count visits anonymously by default. Accept to also enable session replay and remember your visit across pages, which helps us improve the product.
landing.title: QR Photo Gallery — one QR code for every guest's event photos
landing.meta_description: Collect every guest's photos and videos from your wedding, party or event with one QR code. No app, no logins, original quality. Unlimited uploads, one-time €19.
landing.hero.step1.title: You create a gallery, we make your QR code
landing.hero.step1.text: Print it, frame it, put it on every table.
landing.hero.step2.title: Guests scan it and upload their photos
landing.hero.step2.text: Opens in the browser — no app, no account, nothing to explain.
landing.hero.step3.title: Everything lands in one shared gallery
landing.hero.step3.text: Full original quality, live during the event.
landing.hero.trust: One-time payment · Free to set up · 14-day money-back guarantee
landing.demo.ready.guide: Try it now — this code is unique to you.
landing.demo.ready.title: Scan this QR code
landing.demo.ready.text: Point your phone camera at it. A fresh, private upload page will open instantly.

landing.demo.privacy: Private demo · Automatically deleted after one hour
landing.demo.gallery.title: Your demo gallery
landing.demo.gallery.empty_text: It is empty for now. Choose a photo on your phone and watch this space.
landing.demo.scanned.guide: Perfect — your phone is connected. Upload a photo there, or use our sample.
landing.demo.photo.alt: The photo uploaded to your temporary demo gallery
landing.demo.photo.guide: There it is — live. Open it, then download the original.
landing.demo.lightbox.label: Demo photo viewer
landing.demo.lightbox.hint: Exactly the same photo, ready to keep.
landing.demo.complete.eyebrow: You just tried the whole product
landing.demo.complete.title: Ready to make yours real?
landing.demo.complete.text: Your event works exactly like this demo: one QR code, instant uploads and every original in one place. Continue only when it feels right.
landing.demo.complete.note: We'll create your account first, then open secure card checkout. Includes a 14-day money-back guarantee.
landing.demo.error.title: The demo took a short break
landing.demo.error.text: We couldn't prepare your private gallery. Your browsing is unaffected — try once more when you're ready.
landing.demo.expired.text: This one-hour demo has expired. Start a fresh one to keep trying it.
landing.how.title: Simple enough to set up right now
landing.how.subtitle: Three steps, no technical setup, and no app for anyone.
landing.how.step1.title: Create your gallery
landing.how.step1.text: Enter your event name. Your private gallery and QR code are ready in seconds.
landing.how.step2.title: Share the QR code
landing.how.step2.text: Print the ready-made poster, or add the code to your table cards, signs and invites.
landing.how.step3.title: Guests scan & upload
landing.how.step3.text: They point a phone camera at the code and add photos and videos — no app, no account.
landing.uses.title: One gallery for every kind of gathering
landing.example.title: One link. Everyone's view of the day.
landing.example.text: Guests browse the same shared gallery you do — a clean feed that fills up live as the celebration goes on. Scan the code above to open a real one.
landing.example.caption: Opens in any phone browser — nothing to install.
landing.features.title: Everything most event apps make hard — made effortless
landing.features.subtitle: Most event photo apps compress your pictures, cap how many you can collect, leave out video, or bill you every month. We took all of that out.
landing.features.f1.title: Unlimited uploads*
landing.features.f1.text: Collect as many photos and videos as your guests can take. No per-photo limits, no counter ticking down.
landing.features.f2.title: True original quality
landing.features.f2.text: Every file is kept exactly as it was captured — no compression, no resizing, no watermarks.
landing.features.f3.title: Video, not just photos
landing.features.f3.text: MP4, MOV and more, up to 2 GB each — the speeches and the dance floor, not only the posed shots.
landing.features.f4.title: No app, no accounts
landing.features.f4.text: Guests scan and upload straight from the browser. Nothing to install, nothing to sign up for.
landing.features.f5.title: Yours for a full year
landing.features.f5.text: Download the originals any time in the 12 months after your event. No 'gallery expires tomorrow'.
landing.features.f6.title: Private & EU-hosted
landing.features.f6.text: Only people with your link can open the gallery. Files are stored in the EU, GDPR-conscious.
landing.features.soft_note: * Fair-use soft cap of 100 GB per gallery — enough for thousands of photos and plenty of video. Planning something bigger? We'll raise it.
landing.price.title: €19 for your whole event
landing.price.text: Everything above, for one event gallery, paid once.
landing.trust.title: A new service — with honest, simple promises
landing.trust.subtitle: No inflated review counts and no borrowed logos. Just terms that make trying us an easy call.
landing.trust.t1.title: 14-day money-back guarantee
landing.trust.t1.text: Not happy, for any reason? Email us within 14 days and we refund you.
landing.trust.t2.title: Free to try first
landing.trust.t2.text: Create your gallery and test the QR code before you pay a cent.
landing.trust.t3.title: One-time payment
landing.trust.t3.text: No subscription, no card kept on file, no surprise renewals.
landing.trust.t4.title: Secure EU checkout
landing.trust.t4.text: Payments run through Lemon Squeezy and your files stay in the EU.
landing.faq.title: Good questions, honest answers
landing.faq.q1: Do my guests need to download an app?
landing.faq.a1: No. They point their phone camera at the QR code and a web page opens where they pick photos or videos and upload them. It works on any modern phone.
landing.faq.a2: Never. We store the exact file your guest selected — full resolution, original quality, no social-media downsizing.
landing.faq.q3: Is there really no upload limit?
landing.faq.a3: Uploads are unlimited for any normal event. There's a fair-use soft cap of 100 GB per gallery — thousands of photos and plenty of video — and we'll happily raise it if you're planning something bigger.
landing.faq.a4: Yes — MP4, MOV, WebM and more, up to 2 GB per file. Photos and videos share the same gallery.
landing.faq.a5: Only people with your link or QR code. Nothing is public or searchable, and the Commercial plan can also switch guest downloads off.
landing.faq.a6: No — one payment, no renewals, no card kept on file, and a 14-day money-back guarantee.
landing.final.eyebrow: Ready in the next five minutes
landing.final.title: Your guests already know how to scan a QR code
landing.final.subtitle: Give them one code and get every photo and video from your event in one place.
landing.final.note: Free to set up · One-time payment · 14-day money-back guarantee

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.meta_description: One-time pricing for an event photo & video gallery: €19 personal, €29 commercial. Unlimited uploads, original quality, no subscription.
pricing.hero_subtitle: The same complete gallery at both tiers — unlimited uploads, original quality, no subscription. Pick the licence that fits how you'll use it.
pricing.compare.eyebrow: Before you settle for the usual
pricing.compare.title: How we compare to a typical event photo app
pricing.compare.note: Based on features commonly offered by event photo-sharing apps. Check for yourself — we think the difference is hard to unsee.
pricing.standard_for: Private parties, weddings, birthdays and family events
pricing.premium_for: Photographers, venues, agencies, brands and company events
pricing.feature_media: Photos and videos in all common formats
pricing.feature_guest_zip: Download every original in one ZIP
pricing.feature_client_events: Use for client and company events
pricing.soft_cap: * Fair-use soft cap of 100 GB per gallery. Plenty for any event — and we'll raise it if you need more.
pricing.included.title: The gallery is the product.
pricing.included.text: Both paid tiers include the full upload and gallery experience, unlimited uploads, original files, the QR PNG and printable poster. Commercial changes the usage licence and adds client-facing controls — it does not hide the basics behind another tier.
pricing.faq.a1: No. It's a one-time payment — no automatic renewal, no recurring charges and no card kept on file.
pricing.faq.q2: What is the difference between Personal and Commercial?
pricing.faq.a2: Both include the full gallery, unlimited uploads, 100 GB, original-quality photos and video, QR downloads and a year of access. Commercial adds the right to use it for clients, customers and paid work, client-facing download controls and priority support.
pricing.faq.a3: Upload as many photos and videos as your event produces. A fair-use soft cap of 100 GB per gallery keeps one account from overloading the servers — but it's flexible, and we'll raise it if you get close.
pricing.faq.a4: Your account is upgraded within seconds. Batch uploads, 100 GB storage and gallery ZIP downloads unlock immediately.

guides.inline_note: One QR code · unlimited guests · original quality
guides.cta.title: Collect every photo from your event — with one QR code
guides.cta.text: Create your gallery in two minutes, print the QR code, and let guests upload straight from their phones. No app, no logins, everything in full original quality.
guides.cta.b1: One QR code, unlimited guests and uploads
guides.cta.b2: Photos and videos in original quality
guides.index.title: Photo-Sharing Guides for Weddings & Events | QR Photo Gallery
guides.index.meta_description: Practical guides on collecting photos and videos from your guests with a single QR code — for weddings, prom, birthdays, corporate events and graduations.
guides.index.h1: Guides for collecting event photos with a QR code
guides.index.intro: Everything you need to gather every photo and video from your guests — one printed QR code, no app, original quality. Start with your occasion below.
guides.group.wedding_title: QR photo albums & galleries for weddings
guides.group.wedding_text: The complete playbook for collecting your wedding photos from every guest — the album, the live gallery, and how to set it up.
guides.group.occasion_text: From prom and Abiball to birthdays, company parties and graduations — one QR code fits them all.
